# af editor invokes the configured terminal or visual editor with the workstream
# worktree path as its argument. When no editor is configured the command exits
# non-zero and reports "no editor configured" on stderr.

env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $HOME/.config/af
mkdir $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo
cp config.toml $HOME/.config/af/config.toml
cp state.toml $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml

# --terminal flag invokes [editor].terminal with the worktree path as argument.
exec af editor demo --terminal
stdout '/tmp'

# --visual flag invokes [editor].visual with the worktree path.
exec af editor demo --visual
stdout '/tmp'

# Without a flag the visual editor is tried first, then terminal; both are
# "echo" in the test config so the worktree path still appears.
exec af editor demo
stdout '/tmp'

# When [editor].terminal is empty the command must fail with a clear message.
cp noeditor.toml $HOME/.config/af/config.toml
! exec af editor demo --terminal
stderr 'no editor configured'

-- state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
name = "demo"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp"
branch = "feat/demo"
base_branch = "main"

-- config.toml --
schema_version = 1

[editor]
terminal = "echo"
visual = "echo"

-- noeditor.toml --
schema_version = 1

[editor]
terminal = ""
visual = ""
